message:
feat(pt-core): implement tool runner with timeouts and caps (71t)

Add robust tool runner for executing external commands (ps, lsof, etc.)
with safety controls:

- Per-command timeout with SIGTERM → SIGKILL escalation
- Output size caps (default 10MB) to prevent memory exhaustion
- Parallel execution with configurable concurrency limits
- Cumulative budget tracking for overhead management
- nice/ionice wrappers to limit system impact
- Command path validation to prevent injection
- Allowlist support for restricting allowed commands

Key components:
- ToolRunner struct with shared budget tracking
- ToolSpec for configuring individual tool runs
- ToolRunnerBuilder for easy configuration
- Convenience functions run_tool() and run_tools_parallel()

Non-blocking I/O uses fcntl O_NONBLOCK for timeout enforcement
without blocking on commands that produce no output.

14 unit tests covering timeout, truncation, budget, allowlist,
parallel execution, and error handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
